# Paths a renovate[bot] PR may NEVER touch and still be auto-approved — the
# approval trust machinery. Everything else Renovate changes (workflow action
# pins, chart image tags) is governed by the renovate.json5 automerge policy.
# One grep -E pattern per line; blank lines and # comments are ignored. Matched
# against every file in the PR net diff (new paths and rename sources).

^\.github/auto-approve-
^\.github/workflows/repo-auto-approve\.yaml$
^\.github/CODEOWNERS$

# --- Chart public API Renovate never legitimately edits ---
^charts/.+/values\.schema(\.extra)?\.json$
^charts/.+/constraints\.tpl$
